description: Synthetic inbox threads for lookup, triage, and drafting tasks.

emails.subject: Launch review follow-up
emails.body: Can you summarize the launch blockers and tell me what needs executive review by Monday?

emails.subject: Reporting latency question
emails.body: Our admins are seeing slow reporting dashboards. Is there a workaround this week?

emails.subject: Need updated pricing deck
emails.body: Prospects keep asking about audit coverage in the base plan. We need a cleaner deck.

emails.subject: Search ranking notes
emails.body: Precision improved, but recall still drops on long queries. Please propose next steps.
